use_cases: Hero section text reveal animations on page load
Landing page headline effects for visual engagement
Feature or benefit text animations to draw attention
Call-to-action text styling with smooth transitions
Portfolio or creative website text effects
ai_summary: A lightweight text blur reveal animation component built with GSAP that splits text into individual characters and animates them from a blurred, semi-transparent state to clear text. The effect features staggered timing with smooth ease-out transitions, making it ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and anywhere compelling text entrance animations are needed.
